hero.title: Learn English
hero.subtitle: Kutaisi English Academy offers internationally-aligned courses taught by certified educators. Whether you're a beginner or preparing for IELTS — we'll get you there.

about.title: Trusted English Education in the Heart of
about.description: For over eight years, Kutaisi English Academy has been the city's leading destination for professional English language education — from complete beginners to advanced speakers.
highlights: Founded in 2017 with a mission to make quality English education accessible
Curriculum fully aligned with the Common European Framework of Reference (CEFR)
Small group sizes ensure personalized attention for every learner
Modern, communicative teaching methodology backed by research
about.quote: Our mission is simple: give every student in Kutaisi the tools to communicate confidently in English — and unlock the world.

courses.title: Find the Perfect
courses.description: From absolute beginner to advanced professional — each programme is designed with clear outcomes, proven methodology, and personalized support.
courses.placementNote: Not sure which level is right for you?

items.title: Foundation English
items.description: Build a solid foundation from scratch. Perfect for absolute beginners or those looking to strengthen the basics of reading, writing, and speaking.

items.title: Progressive English
items.description: Take your English to the next level. Focus on fluency, grammar accuracy, and professional communication skills used in real-world situations.

items.title: Mastery English
items.description: Achieve near-native proficiency. Designed for confident speakers aiming for academic excellence, IELTS/TOEFL certification, or international careers.

items.title: Business English
items.description: Tailored for professionals and entrepreneurs. Master the language of global business — from meetings and negotiations to emails and reports.

benefits.title: Everything You Need to
benefits.description: We've built our academy around what actually works — research-backed methods, expert teachers, and an environment where students thrive.
benefits.ctaDesc: Join over 1,200 students who have transformed their English with us.
benefits.ctaBtn: Start Today — It's Free to Assess

items.title: Experienced Teachers
items.description: Our educators hold internationally recognized CELTA/DELTA certifications with 5–15 years of teaching experience.

items.title: Small Group Classes
items.description: Maximum 8 students per class ensures every student receives individual attention and personalized feedback.

items.title: Modern Methodology
items.description: We use communicative, task-based learning aligned with the Common European Framework of Reference (CEFR).

items.title: Flexible Scheduling
items.description: Morning, afternoon, and evening classes available — weekdays and weekends — to fit your lifestyle.

items.title: Native-Speaker Sessions
items.description: Regular sessions with native English speakers provide authentic language exposure and real-world practice.

items.title: Certified Curriculum
items.description: Our curriculum meets international educational standards with proven outcomes and progress tracking for every student.

testimonials.title: Hear from Our
testimonials.description: Don't take our word for it. Here's what our students say about their experience at Kutaisi English Academy.

items.name: Mariam Kvaratskhelia
items.text: After just 6 months at Kutaisi English Academy, I passed my IELTS with a 7.5 score. The teachers are incredibly patient and the small class sizes meant I could ask questions freely. I honestly couldn't have done it without them.

items.name: Giorgi Tsikarishvili
items.text: I needed Business English for my remote job with a UK company. The Business English course gave me confidence in meetings and writing professional emails. My manager noticed the improvement within weeks.

items.name: Ana Beridze
items.text: I started from absolute zero and now I can have full conversations in English. The teachers make learning fun and engaging. The academy feels like a family — everyone supports each other.

items.name: Luka Gelashvili
items.text: I had taken English courses before, but nothing like this. The methodology here is completely different — practical, modern, and results-oriented. I can now lead international client calls confidently.

items.name: Nino Shalamberidze
items.text: As a doctor needing English for international conferences and research papers, the Advanced course was exactly what I needed. The academic writing component was invaluable for my career.

cta.title: Start Your English
cta.description: Take the first step toward fluency. Our placement assessment is completely free — no pressure, no commitment. Just find out where you are and where you can go.

contact.title: Let's Start a
contact.description: Have questions about our courses? Ready to enroll? Fill in the form and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.

form.name: Full Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your English goals, current level, or any questions...
form.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will contact you within 24 hours to discuss your learning goals.
form.privacy: By submitting this form, you agree to be contacted by our team regarding your inquiry. We respect your privacy and will never share your information.

footer.tagline: Empowering students across Kutaisi to master English and open doors to global opportunities since 2017.
footer.copyright: Kutaisi English Academy. All rights reserved.
